# MCP CI (`ci-mcp.yml`)

**Triggers**: `pull_request`, `push`

```mermaid
graph TD
    classDef gate fill:#4a9eff,stroke:#2563eb,color:#fff
    classDef plumbing fill:#a78bfa,stroke:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    classDef test fill:#34d399,stroke:#059669,color:#fff
    classDef collation fill:#fbbf24,stroke:#d97706,color:#000
    classDef sideeffect fill:#f87171,stroke:#dc2626,color:#fff

    changes{{"Determine need to run MCP checks"}}
    build["Build Package"]
    integration-tests["Integration Tests"]
    unit-tests["Unit Tests"]
    handle-snapshots("Commit snapshot changes")
    mcp_tests[["MCP Tests Pass"]]

    changes -->|mcp| build
    changes -->|mcp| integration-tests
    changes -->|mcp| unit-tests
    changes -->|mcp| handle-snapshots
    unit-tests --> handle-snapshots
    build --> mcp_tests
    changes --> mcp_tests
    handle-snapshots --> mcp_tests
    integration-tests --> mcp_tests
    unit-tests --> mcp_tests

    class changes gate
    class build test
    class integration-tests test
    class unit-tests test
    class handle-snapshots sideeffect
    class mcp_tests collation
```

## Legend

| Shape        | Color  | Meaning                   |
| ------------ | ------ | ------------------------- |
| Hexagon      | Blue   | Gate / change detection   |
| Stadium      | Purple | Plumbing / matrix builder |
| Rectangle    | Green  | Test / core work          |
| Subroutine   | Yellow | Collation / status gate   |
| Rounded rect | Red    | Side effect / snapshots   |

Edge labels show the change-detection output that gates the job.

## Job details

| Job                 | Depends on                                                      | Condition                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Matrix |
| ------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| `changes`           | -                                                               | -                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | -      |
| `build`             | changes                                                         | mcp                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | -      |
| `integration-tests` | changes                                                         | mcp                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | -      |
| `unit-tests`        | changes                                                         | mcp                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | -      |
| `handle-snapshots`  | changes, unit-tests                                             | mcp && github.event_name == 'pull_request' && github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name == github.repository && !contains(github.actor, '[bot]') && github.actor != 'posthog-bot' && !contains(github.actor, 'github-actions') | -      |
| `mcp_tests`         | changes, build, unit-tests, integration-tests, handle-snapshots | -                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | -      |
